description_long: This object is a small bouquet of flowers, featuring at least two prominent blooms: one red and one yellow, surrounded by green leaves and some white floral elements. The petals of the main flowers are layered and slightly curled, with the red flower appearing fuller and more central, while the yellow flower is slightly off to the side. The leaves are broad, ovate, and have a slightly glossy texture, with visible veins and a natural, irregular arrangement. The stems are green and slender, supporting the flowers and leaves in a loosely gathered cluster. The overall appearance is that of a freshly cut floral arrangement, typical of what might be found in a small vase or as part of a decorative urban display. The colors are vibrant, with the red and yellow flowers providing a striking contrast against the green foliage and white accents.
description: A small, vibrant bouquet with red and yellow flowers, green ovate leaves, and white floral accents, arranged in a natural cluster. The petals are layered and the stems are slender and green.
description_view_0: Front view showing both the red and yellow flowers clearly, with green leaves and white accents visible below.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the bouquet, with the red flower more prominent and the yellow flower partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view with the red flower facing forward and the yellow flower slightly behind, leaves and stems more visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the yellow flower more clearly, with the bouquet's white accents and green leaves in profile.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a whorled configuration, with overlapping layers radiating from the center of each flower, creating a full and rounded appearance typical of roses.
